import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { Router } from '@angular/router'; import { AuthService } from '../../services/auth.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-sidebar', templateUrl: './sidebar.component.html', styleUrls: ['./sidebar.component.css'] }) export class SidebarComponent { constructor(private router: Router, private authService: AuthService) {} logout(): void { this.authService.logout(); this.router.navigate(['/']); } }
@
